hooks.command: cd "/Users/sananth/Documents/Mac Backup/Languages/Python/finviz-screener-agent-new" && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main

cd "/Users/sananth/Documents/Mac Backup/Languages/Python/finviz-screener-agent-new" && changed=$(git diff HEAD~1 --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^(agents/|\.github/workflows/|utils/|CLAUDE\.md)'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "SYSTEM_DOCS.md REMINDER: Files changed in agents/, .github/workflows/, utils/, or CLAUDE.md — update SYSTEM_DOCS.md if these changes affect architecture, agent behavior, rules, or secrets before ending the session."}}'; fi
